\u251c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2524 \u2502  User locks ETH \u2192 Proof generated off-chain (SP1/Plonky2)       \u2502 \u2502                 \u2192 Proof submitted to L1                          \u2502 \u2502                 \u2192 Verifier validates aggregated Dilithium sigs   \u2502 \u2502                 \u2192 Assets released to recipient                   \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 Security Model: 1. ZK Proof: Proves N Dilithium signatures were valid (aggregated) 2. Commitment Check: Public inputs contain Dilithium commitment hash 3. Replay Protection: Each transfer has unique nonce 4. params._verifier: Address of the initial ZK verifier contract

returns.released: Whether the lock has been released
returns.sender: The address that created the lock

returns._0: True if using a STARK-based verifier

params.dilithiumPubKeyHash: Hash of the Dilithium public key that will sign the release

release(bytes,uint256[]).details: Validates proof and checks commitment matches the lock

params.proof: The ZK proof of aggregated Dilithium signature verification
params.publicInputs: The public inputs to the proof

params.newVerifier: Address of the new verifier contract

constructor.notice: Initialize the bridge with a verifier

isQuantumResistant().notice: Check if the current verifier is quantum-resistant

locks(bytes32).notice: Mapping of lock ID to lock details

release(bytes,uint256[]).notice: Release locked assets by providing a valid ZK proof

updateVerifier(address).notice: Update the ZK verifier (for quantum-resistance upgrade)
